name: Lineage Dependency Engine (PLANNED, Sprint C)
what_it_solves: Second Layer-1 engine that will score tissue-lineage-specific dependencies as a peer to synthetic lethality.
how_it_solves: Not yet implemented; roadmap Sprint C reserves the module path and contract slot.
why_it_exists: Some axes (e.g. WRN, RB1-cyclin dependencies) are better framed lineage-first than SL-first — this engine will carry that logic separately from the SL fuser.
gaps_still_open: Not built. No code path exists in crispro-backend-v3 as of roadmap snapshot.
